# Membership Onboarding Agent (Uplizd) - Automated member registration and welcome workflows

## Summary
The Membership Onboarding Agent is an automated Uplizd workflow designed to streamline the registration of new members within Brilliant Directories. By integrating real-time data processing with intelligent agent logic, this solution eliminates manual entry, ensures immediate welcome communication, and maintains high data hygiene during the onboarding lifecycle. It serves as a single source of truth for membership status, significantly increasing pipeline velocity for community managers and operations teams.

---
